summary: Video. Pawn Stars' Rick Harrison stands with arms spread wide in the White House Blue Room and says to camera: 'Okay, the best I can do is the golden age for small businesses.' The clip ends on a black card with a line-art White House and the text 'THE WHITE HOUSE.'

script.scene: Rick Harrison stands centered in the blue-and-gold White House Blue Room (period portraits, gilded chairs, candelabra), arms spread wide.
Same shot, Harrison gesturing as he says to camera: 'Okay, the best I can do is the golden age for small businesses.'
Cut to black end card: line-art White House logo with text 'THE WHITE HOUSE.'

notable_text: Spoken: 'Okay, the best I can do is the golden age for small businesses.' Tweet: 'BEST I CAN DO IS THE GOLDEN AGE FOR SMALL BUSINESSES. Pawn Stars' Rick Harrison x White House.' End card: 'THE WHITE HOUSE.'
